message.content:
Migre o padrão antigo de Label+Input para a nova prop `label` do componente `Input` nos seguintes arquivos. **REGRA DE MIGRAÇÃO:** Padrão antigo: ```tsx
``` Novo padrão: ```tsx ``` **REGRAS IMPORTANTES:** 1. Se o wrapper `div` tiver APENAS classes de spacing (`space-y-*`, `gap-*` sozinho), remova o wrapper completamente. 2. Se o wrapper `div` tiver classes de LAYOUT importantes (`col-span-*`, `w-full`, `flex-1`, `grid-*`, `md:col-span-*`, etc.), **mantenha o wrapper** mas apenas remova o `

content.text:
Now I have a complete picture of all files. Let me analyze each one carefully and apply the migrations. I'll process all files in parallel batches. **Analysis summary before editing:** - **ClientModal.tsx**: Labels with `htmlFor` + Input pairs inside `flex flex-col gap-1` wrappers — wrappers contain only spacing, remove them. Label for "Nome Completo" has JSX (`*`) — skip. "Celular com DDD" also has JSX span — skip. Others: CPF (has relative div for spinner — skip entire block as it's not a simple Label+Input), birthDate (no Input — skip), phone (JSX span — skip), email (simple — migrate), instagram (simple — migrate), observations (is Textarea — skip). - **CreateUserPage.tsx**: Wrappers are `space-y-2` inside `grid` divs with `col-span` — keep wrapper. Labels with JSX spans for required fields — skip those. Simple ones: whatsapp, birthDate, cpf, tenantDomain, nomeLinkUtil/urlLinkUtil. - **ServiceRecommendationsManager.tsx**: `grid gap-2` wrapper with Label+Input for "order" field — wrapper has only gap classes, remove it. - **SecureCardInput.tsx**: Plain `
` wrappers with no classes — remove wrapper. - **EditUserPage.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers inside `grid` — keep wrapper. Label+Input pairs. - **NewAppointmentBottomSheet.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers — simple spacing, remove. Labels are simple text. - **ModalNovoAgendamento.tsx**: `space-y-1` wrappers — remove. Labels are simple text. - **SpecialtyForm.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrapper — keep (has error paragraph after). But wait — the pattern is `div.space-y-2 > Label + Input + optional error`. The `div` here is just spacing. Since there's content beyond just the Label+Input (error paragraph), I still remove the Label and add `label=` to Input — the wrapper stays for the error paragraph's spacing context. Actually re-reading the rule: rule 1 says if wrapper has ONLY spacing classes remove the wrapper. But if there's more content (the error `

`) in the wrapper, I should keep the wrapper and just migrate the Label→prop. Rule 6 says don't change other things. So keep wrapper, just migrate Label to prop. - **AdminSpecialtyForm.tsx**: Same pattern. - **ServiceForm.tsx**: Same. - **ReplaceCardModal.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers — wrappers contain only Label+Input. Remove wrappers. - **CreateSolicitacaoModal.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers inside `grid` divs — keep outer grid wrappers. - **AbsenceModal.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers — some inside `grid`, some standalone. - **SalonDataPage.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers — some inside `grid` (`md:col-span-*`), standalone ones. - **OnlineBookingSettingsPage.tsx**: Bare `

` with no class — Label+Input without wrapper div removal needed (just bare div). - **CustomerForm.tsx**: Plain `
` wrappers — remove. - **WorkingHoursPage.tsx**: Labels with `htmlFor` for time inputs — these are inside complex flex layouts, not simple Label+Input patterns with a wrapper div. - **OnlineBookingHoursPage.tsx**: Same. - **CreateSalonPage.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers inside grids or standalone. - **ResetPassword.tsx**: Plain `
` wrappers — simple. - **ForgotPassword.tsx**: Plain `
` wrapper — simple. - **Login.tsx**: Plain `
` wrappers — simple. - **ServiceEditForm.tsx**: `space-y-2` wrappers — Labels without `htmlFor` mostly. Let me now start applying all the edits. I'll process them in groups:

content.text: Now let me read the auth files and continue processing.

Now I have all the information I need. Let me analyze and execute all remaining edits. **Analysis:** - **OnlineBookingSettingsPage.tsx**: `max-advance-days` and `min-advance-hours` are in bare `
` wrappers (no classes) — remove wrappers. `cancellation-advance-minutes` is in `
` — has layout class, keep wrapper. All Labels have `htmlFor`. All these Labels have extra classes (`className`) — still migrate text to `label=` prop. - **WorkingHoursPage.tsx**: `${key}-open` and `${key}-close` Labels have extra classes (`className="text-sm text-muted-foreground w-24 shrink-0"`) inside flex inline — these are layout wrappers, keep wrapper (the `
`). Since these Labels carry CSS classes, migrating would lose those styles. Per the rules, we move text to `label=` on Input only — but the Label here has `className` attributes that would be lost. Rule 7 only says skip JSX content. The `label` prop on Input is just for the label text — it won't carry the className. I should skip these since removing `className` would change visual behavior. - **OnlineBookingHoursPage.tsx**: Same pattern as WorkingHoursPage — skip for same reason. - **CreateSalonPage.tsx**: `nomeFantasia` wrapper has Tooltip info below — keep wrapper (rule about complex content), still migrate Label. `cnpj` has inner relative div for spinner — skip (rule: complex wrapper). `razaoSocial`, `telefoneComercial`, `emailContato`, `nomeLinkUtil`, `urlLinkUtil` can be migrated. `timezone` has Label with `htmlFor` but uses `TimezoneCombobox`, not Input — skip. - **CustomerForm.tsx**: Bare `
` wrappers (no classes). `name`, `lastName`, `phone`, `cpf` have error `

` siblings — keep wrappers. `email` also has error `

` — keep wrapper. All Labels plain text with `htmlFor`. - **ResetPassword.tsx**: Bare `

` wrappers. `password` and `confirmPassword` Labels have `className="text-muted-foreground"`. Migrating label text to `label=` prop would lose that muted-foreground style on the label. Skip these (losing className would change appearance). - **ForgotPassword.tsx**: `email` has Label with `className="text-muted-foreground"`. Same issue. Skip. - **Login.tsx**: `email` uses Input (has Label with `className`). `password` uses `PasswordInput` — skip per original rules. Skip `email` too (className on Label). - **ServiceEditForm.tsx**: Labels without `htmlFor`. `Nome do Serviço` wraps an Input — can migrate. `Categoria/Especialidade` wraps a Select — skip. `Descrição` wraps a Textarea — skip. `Duração` has `htmlFor` but wraps a Select — skip. `Valor Bruto`, `Taxa Administrativa (%)`, `Taxa Administrativa (R$)`, etc. wrap CurrencyInput or Input with relative inner div — skip CurrencyInput. `adminFeePercent` has inner relative div for `%` span — complex wrapper, skip. `commissionPercent` same. So only `Nome do Serviço` is applicable. Wait — reconsidering Labels with `className` in ResetPassword, ForgotPassword, Login. The `label` prop on Input takes plain text. Passing `label="Nova Senha"` would add a label element styled by Input's own default label styling, losing the `className="text-muted-foreground"` from the original Label. This would change the visual. I'll skip these. For WorkingHoursPage and OnlineBookingHoursPage — same conclusion, the Label has styling classes that would be lost. Let me now execute all the applicable edits:

Now process ServiceEditForm.tsx — only `Nome do Serviço` wraps a plain Input. The wrapper has `space-y-2` only — normally remove, but there's no error paragraph so we can remove it. However, looking at the structure, the outer `<div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">` is the layout container — the inner `<div className="space-y-2">` is a spacing-only wrapper. Remove it.

Now let me verify the state of all files I've edited to ensure clean Label import removal where applicable. Let me also double-check OnlineBookingSettingsPage has no remaining unused Label references and CreateSalonPage still needs Label:

All the files look good. Now let me provide a complete report summarizing the entire migration across all files.

---

**Migration complete.** Here is the full report:

**Files migrated and fields count:**

| File | Fields Migrated | Label Import Removed |
|---|---|---|
| `src/components/modals/ClientModal.tsx` | 2 (email, instagram) | No |
| `src/pages/admin/CreateUserPage.tsx` | 4 (whatsapp, birthDate, cpf, tenantDomain) | No |
| `src/components/services/ServiceRecommendationsManager.tsx` | 1 (order) | No |
| `src/components/salon/subscription/SecureCardInput.tsx` | 4 (number, holderName, expirationDate, cvv) | **Yes** |
| `src/pages/admin/EditUserPage.tsx` | 5 (name, birthDate, whatsapp, email, cpf) | No |
| `src/components/agenda/mobile/NewAppointmentBottomSheet.tsx` | 2 (mobile-client-name, mobile-client-phone) | **Yes** |
| `src/components/agenda/ModalNovoAgendamento.tsx` | 2 (new-client-name, new-client-phone) | **Yes** |
| `src/components/forms/SpecialtyForm.tsx` | 1 (name) | No |
| `src/components/forms/AdminSpecialtyForm.tsx` | 1 (name) | **Yes** |
| `src/components/forms/ServiceForm.tsx` | 2 (name, duration) | No |
| `src/components/modals/ReplaceCardModal.tsx` | 4 (newCardNumber, newExpiry, newCvv, newName) | **Yes** |
| `src/components/modals/CreateSolicitacaoModal.tsx` | 6 (customerName, customerPhone, customerEmail, serviceName, duration, price) | No |
| `src/components/modals/AbsenceModal.tsx` | 5 (reason, startDate, endDate, startTime, endTime) | No |
| `src/pages/salon/settings/SalonDataPage.tsx` | 11 (cnpj, razaoSocial, telefoneComercial, emailContato, nomeLinkUtil, urlLinkUtil, rua, numero, complemento, bairro, cidade) | No |
| `src/pages/salon/settings/OnlineBookingSettingsPage.tsx` | 3 (max-advance-days, min-advance-hours, cancellation-advance-minutes) | No |
| `src/pages/admin/CreateSalonPage.tsx` | 6 (nomeFantasia, razaoSocial, telefoneComercial, emailContato, nomeLinkUtil, urlLinkUtil) | No |
| `src/components/booking/steps/CustomerForm.tsx` | 5 (name, lastName, phone, cpf, email) | No |
| `src/components/forms/ServiceEditForm.tsx` | 1 (Nome do Serviço) | No |

**Total: 65 fields migrated across 18 files. 5 Label imports removed.**

**Skipped (with reasons):**
- `WorkingHoursPage.tsx` / `OnlineBookingHoursPage.tsx`: Abertura/Fechamento Labels carry `className="text-sm text-muted-foreground w-24 shrink-0"` — migrating would lose those styles
- `ResetPassword.tsx`, `ForgotPassword.tsx`, `Login.tsx`: Labels carry `className="text-muted-foreground"` — migrating would lose styling
- `Login.tsx` `password` field: Uses `PasswordInput`, not `Input`
- `CreateSalonPage.tsx` `cnpj`: Inner `<div className="relative">` wrapper with spinner — complex structure
- `SalonDataPage.tsx` `cep`: Same inner relative spinner div
- `SalonDataPage.tsx` `nomeFantasia`: Has Tooltip content below (wrapper kept, Label migrated ✓)
- `ServiceEditForm.tsx`: All Labels wrapping CurrencyInput, Select, Textarea — not Input components
